zh.Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥
zh.Blantyre, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭藍納可爾布蘭太爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Andrew M Thompson於1493年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥時，他的父親John G Thompson22歲，母親Katherine Afameson18歲。他於1518年與Margaret Lochmatomy結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1571年8月28日在他的家鄉享年78歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥。

zh-hans.Blantyre, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 苏格兰藍納可爾布蘭太爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Andrew M Thompson于1493年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥时，他的父亲John G Thompson22岁，母亲Katherine Afameson18岁。他于1518年与Margaret Lochmatomy结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1571年8月28日在他的家乡享年78岁，埋葬在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥。

nameMeanings.name: Thompson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me) (see Thom ) + -son ‘son of Tom’. Thomson is usually the Scottish form, that with the intrusive -p- being English. Both forms are common in Ireland. The surname Thompson is also very common among African Americans.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German Thomsen and of its Swedish cognate Thomsson. Compare Thomson .

variants.name: Thomson
meanings: Scottish, English and northern Irish: variant of   Thompson  .
Scottish: sometimes an Anglicized form of Gaelic McThomas; see McTavish , McComish .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Thomsen  . Compare   Thompson  .

variants.name: Thom
meanings: Scottish and English: from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me), a pet form of Thomas . In Scotland, Thom is also an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Thom, see McComb .
German: from the personal name Thom, a pet form of Thomas . This surname is also found in France.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 譚, see   Tan   1.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Andrew M Thompson was born in 1493, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, John G Thompson, was 22 and his mother, Katherine Afameson, was 18. He married Margaret Lochmatomy in 1518. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 28 August 1571, in his hometown, at the age of 78, and was buried in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Andrew M Thompson est né en 1493, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, John G Thompson, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Katherine Afameson, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Lochmatomy en 1518. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 août 1571, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Andrew M Thompson 1493 in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John G Thompson 22 und seine Mutter Katherine Afameson 18. Er hat 1518 Margaret Lochmatomy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. August 1571 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Andrew M Thompson è nato il nel 1493 nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John G Thompson, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Afameson, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Lochmatomy nel 1518. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 agosto 1571, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew M Thompsonが1493年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウで生まれた時，父John G Thompsonは22歳，母Katherine Afamesonは18歳であった。1518年にMargaret Lochmatomyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1571年8月28日に故郷で78歳で死去し，スコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew M Thompson(이)가 1493년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John G Thompson(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Afameson(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1518년 Margaret Lochmatomy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1571년 8월 28일 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Andrew M Thompson nasceu em 1493, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, John G Thompson, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Afameson, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Lochmatomy em 1518. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1571, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Andrew M Thompson родился в 1493 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John G Thompson было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Afameson, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Lochmatomy в 1518 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 августа 1571 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Andrew M Thompson nació en 1493, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, John G Thompson, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Katherine Afameson, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Margaret Lochmatomy en 1518. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1571, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.
